name: ospec
description: Spec-driven, agentic workflow framework for AI coding agents. Turn a request into a verifiable goal loop — plan, act, verify — with durable specs and evidence in your repo. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, and plain CLI.
summaryZh: Spec-driven, agentic workflow framework for AI coding agents. Turn a request into a verifiable goal loop — plan, act, verify — with durable specs and evidence in your repo. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, and plain CLI. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
